prompt: Invent an original, vivid metaphor for the experience of learning a new language as an adult. Explain it in three sentences.
response: Learning a new language as an adult is like navigating a dense, enchanted forest where every whispering leaf and murmuring brook speaks in riddles; each step you take unravels a hidden path, revealing the secret language of the trees, while the dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy illuminates the beauty and complexity of this mystical world, inviting you to become a part of its ancient, living story.
